decisions.title: Ship Explore V2 with backward compatibility for V1 sharelinks
decisions.context: ENG-9698 re-adds V1 sharelink intercept. Migration requires maintaining user access to historical links while moving pathname structure (ENG-9550). Critical for GA without breaking existing workflows.

arguments.for: Prevents broken links for existing users, maintains trust during migration, allows gradual transition
arguments.against: Technical debt maintaining dual systems, potential confusion in analytics, increases testing surface

decisions.title: Prioritize Table GA readiness over new feature work
decisions.context: ENG-9277 table improvements pre-GA, multiple bugs (ENG-9643 timezone updates, ENG-8756 sync disruption). Table is core to 'Nail the Core' pillar and decision capture. Bugs block enterprise adoption.

arguments.for: Table is foundation for decision workflows, GA quality signals product maturity, unblocks enterprise deals
arguments.against: Delays Canvas and Edge innovation, may slow competitive differentiation

decisions.title: Approve Canvas v2 prototype scope for internal testing
decisions.context: DES-139 Canvas prototype v2 and DES-141 output preview ready. Canvas = 'Build the Moat' through Python Rules integration. Need decision on internal alpha vs limited beta.

arguments.for: Early feedback shapes better product, internal testing derisks external launch, demonstrates progress to leadership
arguments.against: Incomplete features create negative first impressions, support burden on design team, may reveal architectural gaps

decisions.title: Commit to FedRAMP compliance timeline for Analytics squad
decisions.context: ENG-9684 Analytics FedRAMP, ENG-9695/9694 FIPS encryption for S3/EBS. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' in regulated aerospace/defense customers. Impacts Q2 roadmap capacity.
decisions.blockedBy: Security team capacity assessment and certification timeline clarity

arguments.for: Unlocks high-value government contracts, competitive advantage in defense sector, architectural hygiene benefits all customers
arguments.against: Significant engineering distraction from core features, expensive certification process, limited immediate customer base

decisions.title: Standardize Sift Edge metrics/tracing before expanding deployment
decisions.context: ENG-9559 adding metrics crate for common patterns. Edge is 'Embed Deeper' strategy but needs production visibility. Should we mandate this before next customer deployment?

arguments.for: Prevents technical debt at scale, enables proactive support, demonstrates production readiness to customers
arguments.against: Delays current customer deployments, may be premature optimization, adds complexity to edge footprint

keyResults.name: Explore V2 GA with 90% feature parity
